case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. KEITH M MCDOWELL

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MCDOWELL, KEITH M SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-24-2016
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16157021), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED MAY-11-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCDOWELL, KEITH M
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-13-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT (1033) (TRANSACTION ID # 100015392) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-13-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100015392) AS TO DEFENDANT MCDOWELL, KEITH M
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT CCP 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 100015392) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCDOWELL, KEITH M $1,144.92 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,428.92, SEE SCANNED DOC
